name: Orange Pecan Bread
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 350°F.
Cream butter and honey until thoroughly combined. Add egg and orange peel. In a separate bowl, sift flour, baking powder, soda, and salt. Add the flour mixture and orange juice, alternating with the creamed mixture. Stir in pecans. Pour batter into a greased 9x5x3 loaf pan and bake at 350°F for about 1 hour.
